retry_reason: Not applicable — the function unconditionally frees resources and there is no refcount operation whose failure would trigger a retry.

judge.reason: The primary purpose is to clean up and free a ppl_conf structure (clear flags, free child_logs, exit biosets/mempool, destroy kmem_cache, and kfree). There is no reference-count management on the main object; the kmem_cache_destroy call is merely one sub-step in releasing a subordinate resource. The function acts as a destructor, not a get/put/set wrapper.
judge.retry_reason: Not applicable — the function unconditionally frees resources and there is no refcount operation whose failure would trigger a retry.
